resumo: Full-Stack Developer with ~4 years of experience, focused on React, Next.js, TypeScript and Node.js, with end-to-end ownership — from front-end to database, API and AI integration. At ID Brasil Sistemas, builds Wincrm, a multi-tenant SaaS CRM, and created AI features with OpenAI (function-calling) that perform real actions inside the platform. As a freelancer (SIGOLI brand), delivers custom websites and systems with concrete SEO results, including a site ranked #1 on Google with a 100% SEO score. Practices AI-assisted development (Cursor, Claude Code, Codex) to ship faster while keeping quality, tests and clean code. Seeking a Mid-level Full-Stack role where product delivery, performance and an AI edge come together. English: technical documentation reading.

itens: AI-assisted development (Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode)

bullets: Build Wincrm, a multi-tenant SaaS CRM for loyalty and customer relationship, in React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Ant Design v5, Redux Toolkit and React Query (TanStack), shipping product to production.
Implemented cashback modules with FIFO logic, campaigns, bulk messaging, an RFV matrix for customer segmentation, and reports with ApexCharts, expanding the CRM's loyalty intelligence.
Built role-based access control (RBAC) with 4 levels, ensuring security and data isolation in the multi-tenant architecture.
Integrated the WhatsApp Business API (Meta) with Embedded Signup, template management and message dispatch, enabling communication at scale from within the CRM.

Created ChatIA RFV, an AI feature that uses OpenAI with function-calling to analyze the customer base and run real actions in the CRM — tagging segments, creating campaigns, sending messages and reactivating benefits — plus an automated analysis panel.
Contribute to Codex, an internal development-management platform (Kanban, sprints, metrics and auditing), in Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Prisma, MySQL and MongoDB.
Ensured quality with Jest tests and component documentation in Storybook.

Built institutional websites, landing pages, custom systems and CMS for small businesses and professionals, in Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Styled-components, Supabase, Prisma, Prismic CMS and REST APIs.

Delivered Projeto Mais Vida (Next.js, Supabase, Prisma, PostgreSQL): a site ranked #1 on Google with a 100% SEO score, plus an event-management system with RBAC authentication, registrations, calendar and reports, in production for over a year.
Built the Habilidades Humanas RH website in Next.js and Prismic CMS, earning a recurring client with a testimonial and new referrals.
Built the Borracharia Ceasa website, a 48-year-old company in São Paulo, focused on B2B lead capture, local SEO and WhatsApp integration.
Built the MAREV NGO website in Next.js, Prisma and PostgreSQL.
Owned the full cycle: requirements, front-end, back-end, database and SEO optimization.
Taught basic computer skills (Word and Excel) at the Antônio Paulo Pucca Youth Center, for children and young people aged 12 to 29 in situations of social vulnerability.

Built the front-end of a location-intelligence platform that helps companies find customers, monitor competitors and choose store locations, in React, Next.js, TypeScript, Ant Design, Leaflet, Styled-components and GraphQL.
Built front-end of websites and event routes.
Edited video (Adobe Premiere) and images (Adobe Photoshop).
Worked in IT infrastructure, maintaining computers, printers and systems.
Edited videos and segments for the weekly Programa da Mirna Lavecc.

cursos.nome: IT Analyst, Java, Programming Logic and Networks
